package_name: 记忆稳态引擎上线交付包

artifacts.proves: model profiles, thresholds, managed-memory budget, evidence floors and 7 mechanism coverage are machine readable
S_t, C_t, correction level and placement strategy can be computed locally
CLI verifiers and loader share one runtime contract decision source
bad profile, bad snapshot or path-boundary failures refuse to load runtime policy
ModelProfile and runtime policy fields are fixed before product integration
RuntimeMemoryState, MemoryAnchor and CorrectionPlan can be persisted and replayed
product adapter execution is audited separately from suggested CorrectionPlan actions
runtime correction plans can be converted into audited execution events without model calls or raw content persistence
product adapter dry-run execution evidence, preflight, placement receipts, idempotency replay, privacy scan and rollback drill are documented
product_adapter none/medium/strong dry-run execution events can be checked locally without model calls, network calls or product repo writes
long-term snapshots can avoid raw memory content
medium correction execution can be attributed to an explicit adapter invocation
product integration handoff, adapter execution boundaries, evidence quoting rules and failure handling are documented
final local release status, completed scope, evidence limits and next-step boundaries are summarized for handoff
Hermes-style persistent learning is constrained into proposal admission, protected memory, versioning, rollback and recovery boundaries
learning proposal envelopes have fixed fields and reject direct canonical writes, raw payload fields and schema drift
learning proposal admission and context injection rules can be checked locally without product ledger writes
learning proposal admission, protected memory, external recall, rollback and reverted/quarantined context-injection boundaries are machine verified
learning proposal apply/revert dry-run fixtures are constrained to preview-only adapter requests without canonical writes
a low-risk memory learning proposal can be represented without raw prompt, full chat text, or product ledger writes
proposal apply can be previewed as a product adapter request without calling agent-passport or creating a ledger event
proposal revert can be previewed with context denylist effects before product adapter execution
redacted proposal and apply/revert dry-run examples can be checked locally without model, network, ledger, or product API calls
handoff boundary, validation commands, privacy rules and anti-overclaim limits are documented
manifest, docs, readiness report and command lists stay aligned before product integration
delivery package consistency can be checked locally without provider or network calls
manifest validation commands can run from a scrubbed local environment without provider keys or source-repo env defaults
product adapter handoff boundaries and required commands can be checked locally
final release summary boundaries and required commands can be checked locally

seven_mechanisms: 长上下文评测到运行时闭环
cannot_prove: that this engine is a new LLM
that provider models were called by local readiness checks
that product source repos are already integrated
